system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Endurance TN 6
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

You recklessly channel Qi into your fists to produce bursts of purple and golden energy that can strike your foes at distance. This is a Cathartic only Technique. Requirement: To use this Technique you must maintain a vegetarian diet and consume no meat or blood. Eating even a small amount of meat will inhibit your ability to use this Technique for 24 hours. Cathartic: To cast you must make an Endurance roll against TN 6. On a Success you channel the energy into your hands and can strike foes with it at a distance of 30 feet (use Arm Strike against Evade for this ability). Such Attacks deal 4d10 Open Damage. Additionally, double the total number of Wounds caused by this Attack. The energy lasts two rounds plus one per Rank of Neigong. On a Failure you sustain 4d10 Open Damage and take double the usual number of Wounds.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
